author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Delivered: PTX kernels + backend wiring for all 8 ops.

Kernels written:
- div_kernel (binary, div.rn.f32)
- exp_kernel (unary, 2^(x*log2(e)) via ex2.approx)
- log_kernel (unary, log2(x)*ln(2) via lg2.approx)
- sqrt_kernel (unary, sqrt.rn.f32)
- pow_kernel (scalar, 2^(e*log2(x)) via lg2+ex2)
- abs_kernel (unary, abs.f32)
- sigmoid_kernel (unary, 1/(1+exp(-x)))
- tanh_kernel (unary, 2*sigmoid(2x)-1)

All have CPU fallbacks. backend_impl.rs wired. 807 core + 200 gpu tests pass.
